prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 48670→51554→52000→74215。2022–2024 年旧高考理科位次在 4.9–5.2 万间窄幅波动，2025 年四川首次新高考（本科一批→本科批 B 段），物理类最低位次骤升至 74215，主要受批次合并及冷门专业组（园艺等）拉低影响，并非学校热度实质下降；该校在四川理科/物理类招生计划 2022 年 67 人、2023 年 69 人、2024 年 85 人、2025 年 90 人，2026 年计划 94 人，较 2025 年扩招 4 人（+4.4%），扩招幅度温和，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升（2021 年第 170 名→2026 年第 137 名），学校综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆管理措施），无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 104 位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于同类院校中等水平，未出现报考关注度骤升信号。历史投档异常数据中未见宁夏大学断档记录；第五轮学科评估中宁夏大 学无 A- 及以上等级学科，学科竞争力在 211 院校中偏弱，对高分考生的专业吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年四川省普通高考考生总数约 535,000 人，较 2025 年（462,767 人）增加约 15.6%，考生规模明显扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考结构性位次跳升、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+4.4%）、考生总数大幅增加（+15.6%）及学校排名稳步提升等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 74215 名附近小幅波动，新高考效应趋于稳定后位次略有收敛；预测最低位次约 74194 名，区间 73694–74694 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for science/physics category approximately 48670→51554→52000→74215. From 2022 to 2024, the old Gaokao science rankings fluctuated narrowly between 49,000 and 52,000. In 2025, Sichuan implemented the new Gaokao for the first time (undergraduate first batch → undergraduate batch B section), causing the minimum ranking for the physics category to surge to 74,215, mainly due to batch consolidation and the influence of unpopular major groups (such as horticulture), not a substantial decline in the school's popularity. The school's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Sichuan was 67 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 85 in 2024, 90 in 2025, and 94 in 2026, an increase of 4 students (+4.4%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science list has been rising in recent years (170th in 2021 → 137th in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (library management measures), with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 104th (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level among similar institutions, showing no signs of a sudden surge in application attention. No records of enrollment gaps were found in historical abnormal admission data. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates for specialized majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of ordinary Gaokao candidates in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (462,767), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural ranking jump in the 2025 new Gaokao, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4.4%), the substantial increase in total candidates (+15.6%), and the steady improvement in school ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline of 74,215, with a slight convergence after the new Gaokao effect stabilizes. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 74,194, with a range of 73,694–74,694.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 73,694–74,694, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 73,000), focus on competitive majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 74,500), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of sliding.

In 2025, the new college entrance examination history category minimum ranking was 6591, basically unchanged from 2024, indicating a smooth transition to the new exam. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for liberal arts/history category was 26 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 26 in 2025, and 23 in 2026, a reduction of 3 students (-11.5%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable rankings in 2025, reduced enrollment plan in 2026 (-11.5%), a significant increase in total candidates (+15.6%), and the university's steadily improving ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will move forward compared to the 2025 baseline of 6591 (competition intensifies, ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6105, with a range of 5605–6605.
